reasoning: While programmatic metrics show high text retention (shingling > 0.98), the LLM fidelity report indicates major structural and content failures. Specifically, the conversion incorrectly tagged full paragraphs as H2 headers and omitted critical URLs (ncstreams.net, nconemap.net) essential for public navigation. The structural score of 0.5 and the specific nature of the missing content make this document unsuitable for auto-approval.

concerns.analysis: The heading hierarchy generally follows the source (H1 for title, H2 for major sections, H3 for subsections). However, in the later parts of the document, entire paragraphs of descriptive text are incorrectly assigned as H2 headings. Specifically, the sections for FIC, GIS TAC, and M&O (reading order 74, 75, 76) consist of full paragraphs of meeting minutes which have been structuralized as headers rather than paragraph content. This is a major failure of heading assignment.

The FIC will continue to discuss land use planning around military installations in North Carolina as directed by the GICC.
